author: gb9t
content: Iter 110 result: net/core/gen_estimator.md (TC rate estimator - gen_estimator.c ~280 lines; per-(stats, est) NetRateEstimator computing EWMA pps+bps over per-tc-class GnetStatsBasicSync counter + per-bucket idx 0..5 with intervals 0.25/0.5/1/2/4/8 sec + ewma_log smoothing + shared per-bucket timer scheduler iterates est-list + delta-based pps/bps computation per tick + RCU-free + gen_new/replace/kill_estimator + tc UAPI gnet_estimator interval+ewma_log) + virt/kvm/x86-pause-filter.md (PAUSE-loop-exiting + Pause-Filter - vmx.c ~80 lines + svm.c sections; VMX vmcs.secondary-controls PAUSE_LOOP_EXITING + ple_gap 128 + ple_window 4096 + adaptive grow/shrink/max + ple_window_dirty + handle_pause vmexit reason 40 + SVM vmcb.control.pause_filter_count 3000 + pause_filter_thresh decrement-per-PAUSE + kvm_vcpu_on_spin + kvm_vcpu_yield_to with target.mutex try_lock + last_boosted_vcpu round-robin + 2-pass in_kernel-priority yield + LHP mitigation under over-committed CPU). 170 Tier-3s total. Next iter: net/sched/sch_htb.md (HTB hierarchical) + virt/kvm/x86-msr-passthrough.md (MSR passthrough bitmap).
